name: UK Home Office Visa Streaming Tool
PredPol / Geolitica Predictive Policing
harmDescription: Reinforced over-policing of minority communities; LAPD terminated 2021 after internal audit found bias amplification. Santa Cruz banned 2020.

name: HunchLab Predictive Policing (Philadelphia)
harmDescription: Shotspotter-style geographic risk scoring. Audit found no reduction in crime; racial targeting patterns documented by researchers.

name: Palantir Gotham — New Orleans Crime Prediction
harmDescription: Secret surveillance program hidden from city council. NOPD used for years without public oversight. Terminated after Verge investigation.

name: Chicago Strategic Subject List (SSL / 'Heat List')
harmDescription: Pre-crime risk score assigned to 400,000 individuals; disproportionately impacted Black men; used for police visits without due process. Terminated 2020.

name: Los Angeles County RAPS Gang Database (CalGang)
harmDescription: State auditor 2016: 42 individuals listed before age 1; no dispute process; 23 listed as gang members with no documented reason. State mandated reforms 2020.

name: UK Facial Recognition — Metropolitan Police (LFR)
harmDescription: Parliamentary committees found 1 in 6 matches incorrect; discriminatory accuracy across ethnicity documented; deployed without statutory legal basis.

name: Axon Draft One AI Police Reports
harmDescription: AI-generated reports entered into criminal record system. No independent accuracy validation. No dispute mechanism for defendants. Growing adoption with no governance framework.

name: PRISM / NSA Mass Surveillance Program
harmDescription: Mass collection of phone metadata and internet communications; Snowden 2013; federal courts later ruled illegal; zero public accountability mechanism.

name: ICE/DHS Deportation Recommendation Algorithm
harmDescription: Automated scoring of deportation priority. ACLU documented racial and country-of-origin proxies. No independent accuracy validation.

name: Clearview AI — Immigration Enforcement Use
harmDescription: Deployed by 600+ law enforcement agencies before any governance framework; FTC action; wrongful arrests documented; accuracy disparate across skin tones.

name: Virginia Unemployment Insurance Algorithm (UI System)
harmDescription: Systematic wrongful denial of unemployment benefits; Virginia auditor 2019 found 11,000+ wrongful denials; no monitoring of denial accuracy rates.

name: Colorado Automated Child Support Enforcement (PEAK)
harmDescription: Automated child support orders with systematic errors for variable-income earners; OIG audit found widespread incorrect calculations.

name: UK Universal Credit Automation (Debt Deductions)
harmDescription: Automated debt deductions leaving families with insufficient income. NAO 2018 found DWP could not verify deductions were accurate. Parliamentary committees documented suicides linked to system errors.

name: New Zealand WINZ Automated Debt Recovery
harmDescription: Ministry of Social Development automated debt notices; Ombudsman investigation 2019 found systematic errors; affected Māori communities disproportionately.

name: Canada ESDC Employment Insurance Algorithm (EI)
harmDescription: Automated denials of Employment Insurance claims; Senate committee 2020 documented disproportionate impact on seasonal workers; no oversight of algorithmic decision accuracy.

name: Australian NDIS Automated Planning Tool
harmDescription: Algorithmic disability support plans underfunding care needs. Federal Court found process invalid 2021. Independent review found 70% of sample cases underfunded.

name: Belgium Social Security Risk-Profiling System (Datamining)
harmDescription: CBSS automated risk scoring for social fraud; Belgian Privacy Commission found system violated GDPR; no independent accuracy validation.

name: Spain Social Security Algorithm CRUE (fraud detection)
harmDescription: Automated fraud scoring resulting in benefit suspensions; Spanish ombudsman found thousands of wrongful suspensions; no public oversight mechanism.

name: Italy INPS Pension Calculation Algorithm Errors
harmDescription: Systematic pension calculation errors affecting 200,000+ retirees; Parliamentary inquiry found INPS suppressed knowledge of errors for years.

name: Germany Jobcenter Algorithm (Profiling System)
harmDescription: Federal Employment Agency job-placement profiling algorithm. Austrian parallel: AMS Algorithmus ruled illegal by Vienna Administrative Court 2020. German equivalent documented same structural failures.

name: Pennsylvania Child Welfare Risk Screening Tool
harmDescription: Risk screening tool deployed across 67 counties; audit 2021 found racial bias; no systematic validation against outcomes; children of color flagged disproportionately.

name: Los Angeles DCFS Predictive Child Welfare System
harmDescription: Predictive tool for child maltreatment; stopped 2021 after ACLU lawsuit documented racial bias; caseworkers reported over-reliance without override mechanism.

name: New Zealand Child Poverty Risk Algorithm (Vulnerable Children)
harmDescription: Predictive risk modeling to identify children at risk; Privacy Commissioner investigation 2018; no dispute mechanism; Māori over-representation undocumented.

name: French Child Welfare Risk Assessment Algorithm (CAFCAS)
harmDescription: Automated risk scoring used by departmental child protection services; no validation against outcomes; discriminatory patterns by socioeconomic proxy.

name: Scotland Algorithm for Care Placement Decisions
harmDescription: Care placement recommendations algorithm; Scottish Children's Commissioner documented families unable to challenge scores; no independent validation.

name: Epic Sepsis Algorithm (ESM)
harmDescription: UCSF/Michigan studies found 67–83% false positive rate; hospitals activated costly responses unnecessarily; no independent accuracy validation; 170+ hospital deployments.

name: UnitedHealthcare nH Predict AI Denial System
harmDescription: AI denied post-acute care for Medicare patients; 90% appeal reversal rate; physicians not informed of AI determinations; federal lawsuit 2023.

name: Allegheny County Children's Health Insurance Algorithm
harmDescription: CHIP eligibility algorithm systematically denied coverage to eligible children; disproportionate impact on immigrant families.

name: NHS Waiting List Prioritization Algorithm (COVID)
harmDescription: Automated waiting list prioritization during COVID; Health Service Journal found systematic de-prioritization of cancer cases; no independent review mechanism.

name: Optum Health Risk Algorithm (racial bias in insurance)
harmDescription: Science 2019: algorithm used by 200 million patients systematically assigned Black patients lower health-need scores than equally-sick white patients. Cost proxy for health need.

name: Mental Health Predictive Risk Algorithm (UK IAPT)
harmDescription: NHS Improving Access to Psychological Therapies; algorithm prioritized lower-risk patients; disproportionate under-referral of BAME and deprived communities documented.

name: Babylon Health AI GP Triage System (UK NHS)
harmDescription: BMJ investigations found critical diagnoses missed; NHS oversight body found governance 'inadequate'; contract terminated 2022 amid safety concerns.

name: Australia My Aged Care Automated Assessment
harmDescription: Automated functional assessment tool systematically underfunded care packages; Royal Commission into Aged Care 2021 found widespread harm.

name: Singapore AI Triage Algorithm (SGH/restructured hospitals)
harmDescription: Early-warning AI triage; Ministry of Health review found disproportionate false negatives for elderly non-English speaking patients; no independent validation before scale-up.

name: Tenant Safe Screening Algorithm (SecureAlert / TenantAPI)
harmDescription: Automated tenant rejection algorithms using criminal history proxies; FTC investigations; disparate impact on Black applicants; no dispute mechanism.

name: Housing Authority Automated Screening — Chicago CHA
harmDescription: Public housing automated denials; HUD audit 2019 found systematic denial of applicants with minor records; disproportionate impact on Black applicants; no appeals process.

name: HomeSafe/Pathways Housing Algorithm (Houston CoC)
harmDescription: Coordinated entry vulnerability scoring; RICE University study found racial disparity in housing assignment; no accountability for algorithmic outputs.

name: UK Right to Buy Automated Fraud Detection
harmDescription: Automated fraud flagging of Right to Buy applications; NAO found high false positive rate; disproportionate impact on minority applicants.

name: International Baccalaureate Algorithm (COVID grades)
harmDescription: IB awarded predicted grades algorithmically in 2020; 30% of students received lower than teacher predictions; students lost university places; no appeal process at deployment.

name: French Baccalauréat / Parcoursup University Admission Algorithm
harmDescription: University admissions algorithm; Constitutional Council ruled opacity violated transparency rights; discriminatory patterns by geographic origin documented; no systemic independent audit.

name: Texas Virtual School Network Attendance Algorithm
harmDescription: Automated attendance verification for online learning; systematic false positives causing student dis-enrollment; no mechanism to challenge automated flags.

name: UK EAL/SEN Automated Support Allocation Algorithm
harmDescription: Algorithmic allocation of SEN and EAL support; multiple local authorities documented systematic underfunding through opaque scoring; no dispute mechanism for schools.

name: Indiana Teacher Effectiveness Algorithm (RISE)
harmDescription: Value-added model for teacher evaluation; courts found unreliable; American Statistical Association issued rare formal statement against VAM for evaluation; systematic termination of effective teachers.

name: South Carolina Teacher Evaluation Algorithm (TVAAS)
harmDescription: SAS TVAAS value-added model; teacher union lawsuit found SAS refused methodology disclosure; terminations based on scores contradicted by observation.

name: Miami-Dade County Student Discipline Prediction Algorithm
harmDescription: Predictive discipline scoring flagging students for intervention; racial disparities documented; no external validation; no due process for flagged students.

name: HireVue AI Video Interview Screening
harmDescription: FTC investigation 2019; AI facial/voice analysis for hiring found no validated predictive validity; lawsuit; audits found disparate impact on disability, age, race.

name: Workday AI Screening (Mobley v. Workday Lawsuit)
harmDescription: Class action 2023 alleging discriminatory screening on age, race, disability; employer defendant claims it's Workday's system; Workday claims employer's application; accountability gap structural.

name: UK Job Centre Automated Benefit Sanctions Algorithm
harmDescription: Automated referrals for benefit sanctions; DWP internal review suppressed; high false positive rate documented by National Audit Office; no independent monitoring.

name: Australian Workforce Australia Automated Activity Test
harmDescription: Automated compliance requirements for job seekers; Senate inquiry 2023 found system penalizing disabled and vulnerable users; provider incentives misaligned with accuracy.

name: Amazon Delivery Driver Biometric Monitoring
harmDescription: Netradyne/Mentor cameras score drivers continuously; documented false flags for yawning, distraction in tunnels; terminations without human review of AI outputs; NLRB charges filed.

name: UK Windrush Automated Hostile Environment Database
harmDescription: Automated data-matching to deny services to Windrush generation; 15,000+ wrongful denials; deportations of citizens; parliamentary inquiry; Wendy Williams review found systemic failure.

name: Australian ABF Automated Risk Profiling (Operation Sovereign Borders)
harmDescription: Automated risk profiling for asylum seekers; Ombudsman investigations found systematic errors in detention recommendations; no dispute mechanism.

name: US CBP ESTA Risk Scoring Algorithm
harmDescription: Electronic travel authorization risk scoring; denied travel without explanation; no dispute mechanism; disproportionate impact on nationals of certain countries.

name: Canada CBSA Automated Risk Assessment (ICES)
harmDescription: Automated secondary inspection risk scoring; CCLA documented racial disparities; no disclosure to affected travelers; ATIP requests denied.

name: German BAMF Automated Asylum Assessment Tool
harmDescription: Automated dialect analysis for asylum claims; researchers found 68% accuracy insufficient for rights-affecting decisions; no independent validation; halted 2019.

name: Boeing 737 MAX MCAS (Expand from RTF to full failure)
harmDescription: 346 deaths across two crashes; FAA structural capture documented by House Transportation Committee; Boeing suppressed simulator data; no named owner of MCAS safety.

name: UK NHS Babylon Health Chat Doctor App
harmDescription: BMJ found Babylon suppressed results of clinical accuracy test; app recommended hospital for minor issues, missed serious ones; MHRA did not audit before NHS deployment.

name: Australia Automated Road Safety Cameras (Speed Enforcement)
harmDescription: Multiple Australian states documented systematic camera calibration failures; hundreds of thousands of wrongful fines; Victoria admitted 7,700 wrongful prosecutions 2019.

name: UK Automated Parking Enforcement Cameras (ANPR)
harmDescription: Systematic misreads documented; court appeals found camera evidence unreliable; councils continued enforcement without accuracy audits; Treasury Select Committee inquiry 2017.

name: New York MTA Automated Fare Enforcement (AI Evasion Detection)
harmDescription: AI cameras flagging fare evasion; NYCLU documented racial disparities; no validation of algorithm accuracy; algorithm flags used to justify police presence.

name: US CFPB Automated Credit Scoring Disparate Impact (HMDA)
harmDescription: CFPB 2019 mortgage denial analysis found algorithmic systems denied Black and Hispanic applicants at 80% higher rate than white applicants with similar financials.

name: UK TSB Bank IT Migration Algorithm Failure
harmDescription: 1.9 million customers locked out; £330M remediation; FCA investigation found management suppressed migration risk signals; no named owner of migration safety.

name: NatWest / RBS Automated Fraud Detection (False Positives)
harmDescription: Automated fraud detection blocking legitimate customer transactions; systematic failure to notify customers; FCA action for persistent problems.

name: Zillow AI Pricing Algorithm (Zillow Offers Collapse)
harmDescription: $304M quarterly loss; AI systematically overpaid for homes; internal warnings suppressed for quarters; Zillow disbanded iBuying unit Nov 2021.

name: Citibank $900M Automated Payment Error
harmDescription: $900M accidentally sent to creditors; Bankers Trust/REVCO interface automation; court initially ruled recipients could keep funds; SEC investigation.

name: Forensic Logic COPLINK Network (gang database aggregation)
harmDescription: Aggregates gang databases across jurisdictions; ACLU found no de-duplication; individuals inherit incorrect designations; no dispute mechanism.

name: Baltimore Stingray Cell Surveillance Program
harmDescription: Mass collection of cell phone location data without warrants; BPD instructed prosecutors to drop cases rather than disclose; FBI NDA with local PD used to suppress evidence.

name: DNA Probabilistic Genotyping Software (TrueAllele / STRmix)
harmDescription: Software used in criminal prosecutions refuses source code disclosure; courts divided; wrongful convictions documented; defendants unable to challenge methodology.

name: Motorola Video Analytics Evidence Platform
harmDescription: AI video analysis used in prosecutions without independent accuracy validation; documented misidentifications; vendor contracts prevent methodology disclosure.

name: Netherlands Tax Authority (Belastingdienst) Nationality Algorithm
harmDescription: Same institutional culture as SyRI / Toeslagenaffaire; nationality-based risk profiling used internally; Parliamentary inquiry 2021 found same structural failures; 10,000+ affected.

name: Australian ATO Data Matching Debt Collection Algorithm
harmDescription: ATO data matching produced erroneous tax debts for 180,000+ taxpayers; Inspector-General found no oversight of algorithmic accuracy; mirrored Robodebt structural failure.

name: UK HMRC Automated IR35 Compliance Tool (CEST)
harmDescription: Check Employment Status for Tax tool; Parliamentary inquiry found tool unreliable; HMRC refused to guarantee decisions as accurate; 100,000+ wrongly classified.

name: IRS Automated Audit Selection Algorithm (Racial Bias)
harmDescription: Stanford/University of Chicago 2023: Black taxpayers 3–5x more likely to be audited by algorithm; IRS acknowledged problem; DIF formula classified for 30+ years.

name: Virginia VDOT Traffic Management AI System Errors
harmDescription: Automated traffic management produced dangerous signal timing errors; multiple intersection incidents before internal audit found problem; no external reporting mechanism.

name: Pacific Gas & Electric PSPS Automated Shutoff Algorithm
harmDescription: Automated power shutoff decisions affecting millions; CPUC found PG&E could not explain algorithm decisions; disproportionate impact on low-income and medical-need customers.

name: Thames Water Smart Meter AI (Leak Detection Errors)
harmDescription: Smart meter AI generated erroneous 'leak' charges; Ofwat found Thames failed to maintain accuracy; thousands of wrongful high-usage bills.

name: Detroit Water Authority Automated Shutoff System
harmDescription: Automated water shutoffs; UN special rapporteur documented disproportionate impact on Black residents; no dispute mechanism before shutoff; UN Human Rights Council report.

name: Pennsylvania SNAP Automated Benefit Calculator Errors
harmDescription: DHS computer system produced systematic SNAP benefit errors; federal review found thousands of households with incorrect amounts for years.

name: Texas TANF Automated Eligibility System (Your Texas Benefits)
harmDescription: Deloitte-built system produced systematic TANF/Medicaid eligibility errors; HHS audit found 28% error rate; $36M remediation; no monitoring of denial accuracy.

name: California WIC Automated Vendor Monitoring System
harmDescription: Automated vendor termination flags; small grocery stores serving immigrant communities disproportionately terminated based on algorithm without human review.

name: Oregon Medicaid Coordinated Care Organization Algorithm
harmDescription: CCO quality performance algorithms affecting payment rates contained systematic errors undisclosed to OHA; providers penalized for serving complex patients.

name: Ohio Risk Assessment System (ORAS)
harmDescription: Ohio pre-trial and sentencing risk tool; independent research found racial disparities; no ongoing validation against actual outcomes; courts using scores without disclosed methodology.

name: Virginia Risk Assessment Tool (VPRAI)
harmDescription: Pre-trial risk assessment; independent study 2019 found disparate false positive rates for Black defendants; no mechanism for defendants to challenge scores.

name: RRASOR/Static-99 Sex Offender Risk Assessment
harmDescription: Static-99 used for civil commitment decisions; multiple peer-reviewed studies found predictive validity overstated; defendants unable to challenge methodology; life-altering decisions.

name: UK OASys Offender Assessment System
harmDescription: National Offender Management risk assessment; used for parole, supervision, sentencing recommendations; HMPPS found racial disparities 2019; no named owner of accuracy.

name: Chicago PreTrial Risk Assessment (PTRA)
harmDescription: Arnold Foundation PSA tool used at bail hearings; independent validation study found inconsistent performance; judges over-riding algorithm in racially disparate patterns.

name: YouTube Automated Demonetization Algorithm (LGBTQ+/Health content)
harmDescription: Systematic demonetization of LGBTQ+ and mental health content; thousands of creators affected; no disclosed criteria; Congressional testimony found criteria changed without notice.

name: Facebook/Meta Automated Content Removal — Palestine Coverage 2021
harmDescription: Systematic automated removal of Palestinian news content; Meta Oversight Board found systemic error; internal audit leaked documented discriminatory moderation at scale.

name: Twitter/X Automated Shadowbanning Algorithm
harmDescription: Systematic undisclosed reach reduction for accounts; Stanford Internet Observatory found discriminatory patterns; no notification mechanism; users unaware of restrictions.

name: Project Maven / DoD AI Targeting Algorithm
harmDescription: AI targeting assistance; Google employees resigned in protest; DoD could not explain accuracy standards; no civilian oversight mechanism; terminated Google contract, continued with other vendors.

name: NSA XKeyscore Automated Surveillance Targeting
harmDescription: Automated collection of global internet activity; Snowden documents showed analysts could query with no prior approval; PCLOB found exceeded legal authority.

name: UK GCHQ KARMA POLICE Mass Surveillance
harmDescription: Mass collection of internet browsing; Investigatory Powers Tribunal found violated human rights; no independent oversight; Parliament not informed.

name: Uber ATG Autonomous Vehicle Fatal Crash (Elaine Herzberg)
harmDescription: First AV pedestrian fatality; NTSB found Uber disabled Volvo safety systems, suppressed safety concerns; Arizona had no oversight requirements; safety driver not monitoring.

name: Tesla Autopilot Fatalities (Multiple)
harmDescription: Multiple deaths; NTSB repeatedly cited Tesla for failing to implement adequate safeguards; SEC/DOJ investigations; misleading marketing of automation level.

name: Waymo / Cruise AV Regulatory Evasion (California)
harmDescription: Cruise hit pedestrian then dragged her 20 feet; CPUC later found Cruise submitted edited video to regulators; California suspended permit; GM $100M+ cost.

name: Boeing 787 Dreamliner Automated Systems Failures (Battery/Wiring)
harmDescription: FAA grounded entire 787 fleet after battery fires; congressional investigation found FAA 'over-delegated' to Boeing; same structural failure pattern as 737 MAX.

name: Volkswagen Emissions Defeat Device Algorithm
harmDescription: $30B settlement; algorithm detected EPA test conditions and reduced emissions only during tests; EPA had no independent in-field validation; systemic regulatory failure.

name: EPA CAMD Automated Emissions Reporting Errors
harmDescription: EPA audit 2018 found 30% of automated emissions reports contained errors; plants self-certifying without independent validation; no monitoring of reporting accuracy.

name: Dutch PhD Thesis Fraud Detection Algorithm (SURF)
harmDescription: Automated plagiarism detection; multiple graduate students wrongly accused; algorithm generated false positives for legitimate technical writing; no appeal mechanism at deployment.

name: Turnitin AI Detection False Positives in Higher Education
harmDescription: Deployed to 16,000+ institutions; multiple documented false accusations of AI writing; students penalized; Turnitin accuracy ~98% claimed but no independent peer-reviewed validation published.

name: US Department of Education PSLF Automated Rejection System
harmDescription: Public Service Loan Forgiveness: 98% rejection rate; GAO 2018 found servicers systematically providing wrong information; DoEd had no accuracy monitoring of servicer performance.

name: Navient Student Loan Automated Forbearance Steering
harmDescription: CFPB and state AGs: Navient algorithm steered borrowers to forbearance instead of income-driven repayment; $1.85B settlement 2022; 10 years of harm before accountability.

name: Australia VET FEE-HELP Automated Enrollment Scam
harmDescription: Automated enrollment allowed $2.9B fraud; students enrolled without consent; Senate inquiry found DEET had warnings for 18 months before acting; systemic governance failure.

name: South Africa SASSA Social Grant Automated Fraud System (Net1/CPS)
harmDescription: Automated biometric ID for grant access; Constitutional Court twice found system unconstitutional; 17M grant recipients affected; Net1 subsidiary products deducted from grants without consent.

name: Kenya Huduma Namba National ID Algorithm
harmDescription: High Court suspended Huduma Namba after ruling no data protection framework in place; marginalized communities excluded by biometric requirements; no dispute mechanism.

name: Spanair Flight 5022 Takeoff Configuration Warning Failure

HARM: 154 deaths — Barajas Airport, Madrid 2008

LABEL IMPACT: Classified as software bug for years. Governance finding: named suppression of safety alert with no monitoring — C3 and C5 structurally absent.

name: FAA STARS (Standard Terminal Automation Replacement System) Failures

name: Air France Flight 447 Pitot Tube / Automation Handoff
harmDescription:
HARM: 228 deaths — Atlantic Ocean 2009

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as sensor failure and pilot error. Structural finding: known prior events, no monitoring connecting events to training gap, no named owner of recurrent failure pattern.

harmDescription:
HARM: 3 deaths, 181 injuries — San Francisco 2013

LABEL IMPACT: Classified as pilot error. Structural finding: known prior autothrottle confusion events, no mechanism connecting them to mandatory action.

harmDescription:

name: Germanwings Flight 9525 Medical Screening Automation Gap
harmDescription:

name: Southwest Airlines Christmas Meltdown (SWAPA Scheduling System)
harmDescription:
HARM: ~2M passengers stranded; $140M DOT fine; $825M customer compensation

name: FAA NOTAM System Outage (January 2023)

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as database corruption. Structural finding: 10+ year documented risk, suppressed in budget process, no named modernization owner.

name: Therac-25 Radiation Therapy System
harmDescription:
HARM: 3 deaths, 3 severe radiation injuries — North America 1985–1987

LABEL IMPACT: Primary existing RTF case. Full structural coding for domain reference.

name: FDA-Cleared AI Sepsis Prediction (Epic Deterioration Index) — Widespread False Positives
harmDescription:
HARM: 170+ hospitals; published false positive rate 67–83%; unnecessary interventions undocumented at scale

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as implementation variation and model drift. Structural finding: no deployment-context validation, no monitoring, no named owner.

name: Da Vinci Surgical Robot Adverse Events Suppression
harmDescription:

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as device malfunction and operator error. Structural finding: systematic underreporting mechanism, no independent audit, C5 structurally absent.

harmDescription:

name: MD Anderson IBM Watson for Oncology Deployment Failure
harmDescription:

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as AI performance limitation. Structural finding: no deployment-context validation, no named owner, no monitoring — same 5 absences as 160 failure cases.

harmDescription:

harmDescription:

name: Ford Pinto Fuel Tank Design
harmDescription:
HARM: 27+ deaths; hundreds of injuries; landmark products liability case

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as design defect. Structural finding: internal cost-benefit memo explicitly chose not to fix known defect — C5 absent by documented deliberate decision.

name: GM Ignition Switch Defect (Cobalt/Ion)
harmDescription:
HARM: 124 deaths; $900M DOJ settlement; 2.6M vehicles recalled

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as component defect and specification error. Structural finding: known since 2001, internal investigation closed and suppressed, C5 absent by deliberate action.

name: Takata Airbag Inflator Rupture
harmDescription:
HARM: 27 deaths; 400+ injuries; 67–100M vehicles recalled globally

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as manufacturing defect. Structural finding: Takata destroyed test data showing risk — C5 absent by deliberate evidence destruction.

name: Volkswagen Defeat Device Emissions Algorithm
harmDescription:
HARM: $30B+ in settlements; 11M vehicles worldwide; criminal convictions

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as software non-compliance. Structural finding: defeat device was a suppression mechanism by design — the most deliberate C5 absence in the dataset.

name: Tesla Autopilot — Joshua Brown Fatality (2016)
harmDescription:
HARM: 1 death; SEC investigation; NHTSA investigation; 6-week disclosure delay

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as automation limitations and driver inattention. Structural finding: 6-week disclosure suppression, no operational domain owner, C5 absent by deliberate delay.

name: Waymo/Cruise Edited Video Submission to CPUC
harmDescription:
HARM: Pedestrian dragged 20 feet; permit suspended; GM Cruise CEO resigned

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as software limitation. Structural finding: edited video submitted to regulator — documented C5 suppression, named act.

name: Uber Autonomous Vehicle — Elaine Herzberg Fatality
harmDescription:
HARM: 1 death — Tempe, Arizona 2018; first autonomous vehicle pedestrian fatality

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as sensor fusion and safety driver distraction. Structural finding: Uber deliberately disabled safety system, no named owner, prior near-misses suppressed.

name: Toyota Unintended Acceleration (ETCS-i)
harmDescription:
HARM: 89 deaths; $1.2B DOJ settlement; 10M vehicles recalled

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as floor mat interference and driver error. Structural finding: Toyota internal documents suppressed electronic cause — C5 absent by deliberate attribution to non-electronic cause.

name: Healthcare.gov Launch Failure
harmDescription:
HARM: $630M spent; site unusable at launch; millions unable to enroll

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as software performance and integration failure. Structural finding: load testing at 0.2% of actual volume — no named owner, no independent validation.

name: TSB Bank IT Migration Failure (UK)
harmDescription:
HARM: 1.9M customers locked out; £330M remediation; FCA investigation

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as IT migration failure. Structural finding: no named migration owner, no volume validation, no pre-established customer dispute mechanism.

name: NHS National Programme for IT (NPfIT) — £10B Write-Off
harmDescription:
HARM: £10B+ written off; largest civilian IT project failure in history

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as IT project failure and scope creep. Structural finding: clinical rejection suppressed, no named owner of deliverable, no monitoring against requirements.

name: Australian Bureau of Statistics Census Failure (2016)
harmDescription:
HARM: $30M cost; Senate inquiry; IBM contract terminated

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as DDoS attack and capacity planning. Structural finding: no named owner of vendor assurance, no independent validation, no monitoring.

name: Equifax Data Breach (Apache Struts Vulnerability)
harmDescription:
HARM: 147M consumer records; $575M FTC settlement; executive stock sales before disclosure

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as unpatched vulnerability. Structural finding: expired monitoring certificate, executive stock sales before disclosure — C5 absent by deliberate action.

name: SolarWinds SUNBURST Supply Chain Attack
harmDescription:
HARM: 18,000+ organizations including US Treasury, DoJ, DHS; 14-month undetected access

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as nation-state attack and password weakness. Structural finding: no named build integrity owner, 14-month monitoring gap, public misdirection to intern password.

name: Facebook/Meta Oversight Board Systematic Suppression Errors
harmDescription:
HARM: 5.8M accounts exempt from content rules; internal research suppressed for years

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as algorithm error and content policy inconsistency. Structural finding: deliberate suppression of internal harm research — C5 absent by named institutional decision.

name: DuPont PFOA/Teflon Water Contamination (Parkersburg, WV)
harmDescription:
HARM: $671M settlement; 70,000 residents affected; 40-year concealment timeline

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as chemical contamination. Structural finding: 40-year concealment with documented internal knowledge — C5 absent by deliberate institutional suppression across multiple decades.

name: 3M PFAS Military Firefighting Foam (AFFF) Contamination
harmDescription:
HARM: $10.3B settlement; 300+ military base sites; 50-year concealment

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as product liability and regulatory gap. Structural finding: internal documents suppressed 50+ years — among largest C5 absences in the dataset by duration.

name: Pacific Gas & Electric Camp Fire Ignition (Paradise, CA)
harmDescription:
HARM: 85 deaths; 18,804 structures destroyed; $13.5B settlement; criminal conviction

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as equipment failure and vegetation management. Structural finding: PG&E criminal plea for falsified inspection records — C5 absent by deliberate falsification.

name: Erin Brockovich / Pacific Gas & Electric Chromium-6 Contamination
harmDescription:
HARM: $333M settlement; Hinkley population health impacts; 30+ year concealment

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as contamination and corporate concealment. Structural finding: internal monitoring data suppressed from affected community — C5 absent by deliberate institutional action.

name: BP Texas City Refinery Explosion
harmDescription:
HARM: 15 deaths; 180 injuries; $1.6B+ in fines; Baker Panel documented failures

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as process safety failure and equipment malfunction. Structural finding: cost-cutting decisions documented, process safety monitoring absent by design, C5 absent.

name: Bhopal Union Carbide Methyl Isocyanate Gas Leak
harmDescription:
HARM: 3,500–25,000 deaths; 500,000+ affected; largest industrial disaster in history

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as equipment failure and maintenance gap. Structural finding: cost-cutting documentation, multiple safety systems simultaneously offline, C5 absent by deliberate concealment.

name: Love Canal Chemical Waste Site (Hooker Chemical/Occidental)
harmDescription:
HARM: 900+ families relocated; birth defects; EPA Superfund program created in response

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as toxic waste and regulatory gap. Structural finding: Hooker internal knowledge suppressed at transfer — C5 absent, created the policy framework that became Superfund.

name: East Palestine, Ohio Train Derailment — Norfolk Southern
harmDescription:
HARM: Vinyl chloride controlled burn; 1M+ fish killed; ongoing health monitoring

LABEL IMPACT: Framed as derailment and bearing failure. Structural finding: Norfolk Southern lobbied against the safety mechanism (ECP brakes) that would have prevented the crash — C5 absent by deliberate regulatory in

name: Millennium Bug (Y2K) — UK NHS Near-Miss
harmDescription:
HARM: Near-miss averted by governance mobilization — comparator case for RTF analysis

LABEL IMPACT: Y2K is the inverse case: what happens when C1-C5 are mobilized. The NHS systems that failed Y2K remediation share structure with standard RTF cases.

name: SolarWinds SUNBURST
harmDescription: 18-month dwell time across 18,000 orgs incl Treasury, State, DHS, Pentagon. Malicious Orion update.

name: Colonial Pipeline
harmDescription: Fuel supply for Eastern Seaboard shut down 6 days. $4.4M ransom. Single VPN with no MFA exploited.

name: OPM Data Breach
harmDescription: 21.5M federal security clearance records. IG warnings issued for years with no governance response.

name: Equifax Breach
harmDescription: 147M consumer records. Known Apache Struts vulnerability unpatched 78 days despite alert.

name: Target Breach
harmDescription: 40M credit card records via third-party HVAC vendor credentials used for lateral movement.

name: MOVEit Zero-Day
harmDescription: 2,500+ orgs affected incl BBC, British Airways, US federal agencies. Cl0p ransomware zero-day.

name: Marriott/Starwood Breach
harmDescription: 500M guest records. Four-year dwell time post-acquisition. Discovered during due diligence.

name: Yahoo Breach
harmDescription: 3B accounts. Breach undisclosed 3 years. Discovered during Verizon acquisition due diligence.

name: Change Healthcare Ransomware
harmDescription: Prescription processing disrupted across entire US healthcare system for weeks. 100M+ patients.

name: MGM Resorts Breach
harmDescription: $100M+ impact. Social engineering via 10-min LinkedIn/helpdesk call. 10 days disruption.

name: Caesars Entertainment
harmDescription: Same actor/vector as MGM same month. $15M ransom paid. No learning transfer from concurrent incident.

name: AT&T Snowflake Breach
harmDescription: 109M customer call records. Third-party Snowflake environment with no MFA.

name: Capital One Cloud Breach
harmDescription: 100M customer records. Misconfigured AWS WAF. Discovered via external tip not internal monitoring.

name: JPMorgan Chase Breach
harmDescription: 76M households. Two-factor auth not deployed on single legacy server.

name: Anthem Healthcare Breach
harmDescription: 78.8M healthcare records. No encryption on database. Anomalous queries undetected 9 weeks.

name: WannaCry / NHS
harmDescription: 80 NHS trusts. Unpatched Windows XP. NHS Digital patch warning issued 2 months prior.

name: NotPetya Attack
harmDescription: Nation-state wiper. $10B global damage. Maersk, Merck, FedEx among victims.

name: Uber 2016 Breach Concealment
harmDescription: 57M records. Concealed 13 months. $100K ransom paid. Concealment directed by senior leadership.

name: Uber 2022 Social Engineering
harmDescription: Attacker announced breach in internal Slack before Uber security team escalated. MFA fatigue attack.

name: LastPass Breach
harmDescription: Developer laptop compromise led to encrypted vault theft. Same gap exploited twice.

name: Log4Shell
harmDescription: Critical zero-day in ubiquitous open-source library. Exploited within hours of disclosure.

name: Kaseya VSA Supply Chain
harmDescription: 1,500+ downstream orgs. REvil demanded $70M collective ransom.

name: Twitter 2020 Bitcoin Scam
harmDescription: High-profile accounts hijacked via employee social engineering. $120K Bitcoin fraudulently obtained.

name: Okta Third-Party Breach
harmDescription: Support vendor Sitel compromised. Customers not notified 2 months.

name: GoDaddy Repeated Breaches
harmDescription: Three breaches 2019-2023 affecting 1.2M customers. Same gap exploited repeatedly.

name: Facebook Cambridge Analytica
harmDescription: 87M user profiles harvested via developer API. Used for political micro-targeting.

name: Verkada Camera Breach
harmDescription: 150,000 live feeds exposed incl hospitals, prisons. Root cause: superadmin account no MFA.

name: 23andMe Credential Stuffing
harmDescription: 6.9M genetic profiles. No MFA despite uniquely sensitive data. Company blamed users initially.

name: Electoral Commission UK
harmDescription: 40M voter records. Breach undetected 14 months.

name: National Public Data
harmDescription: 2.9B records incl SSNs. Company filed for bankruptcy post-breach.

name: Twitch Source Code Leak
harmDescription: 125GB internal data incl source code and creator earnings. Misconfigured server.

name: CrowdStrike Falcon Outage
harmDescription: 8.5M Windows devices crashed globally. Airlines, hospitals, banks affected simultaneously.

name: T-Mobile API Breach
harmDescription: 54M records. Exposed API no auth or rate limiting. Discovered via dark web post.

name: Snowflake Multi-Org Campaign
harmDescription: 165 orgs breached simultaneously. AT&T, Ticketmaster, Santander. Single absent control — MFA — at scale.

name: Latitude Financial Breach
harmDescription: 14M records AU/NZ. Credential theft via third-party provider. No cross-border notification accountability.

name: Progress Software MOVEit Detailed
harmDescription: 2,500+ orgs across government, healthcare, financial services. BBC, BA, DOE affected.

name: Twilio SMS Breach
harmDescription: Employee SMS phishing. Downstream impact on Signal, Okta as SMS infrastructure provider.

name: Lapsus$ Microsoft/Samsung
harmDescription: 37GB Samsung code, 190GB Nvidia data, Microsoft source code stolen. Insider recruitment.

name: SolarWinds Customer-Side Governance
harmDescription: Customer-side failure. Every affected federal agency accepted vendor update authority in place of internal governance.

name: RockYou2024 Compilation
harmDescription: 10B password records compiled from decades of unaddressed breach data.

name: Google BeyondCorp Zero Trust
harmDescription: After Aurora attacks Google rebuilt entire access model. Named owners per system boundary. Board-level CISO. Pre-established incident protocols.

name: Microsoft Security Dev Lifecycle
harmDescription: Post-Trustworthy Computing memo. Named security owners per product team. Mandatory independent reviews. Pre-established breach protocols.

name: Estonia National Cyber Defense
harmDescription: After 2007 Russian DDoS. Named authority per critical system. Independent validation. 24/7 SOC with named decision authority. CERT-EE protected reporting.

name: UK NCSC Active Cyber Defence
harmDescription: Named authority per defensive service. Independent effectiveness validation. Named reviewers at CERT level. Pre-established escalation. Protected disclosure channels.

name: AWS Security Governance
harmDescription: Named ownership per service team. Mandatory independent security reviews before launch. Pre-established customer notification protocols. Protected internal security reporting.

name: Singapore Cyber Security Agency
harmDescription: Named sectoral leads per critical info infrastructure. Mandatory independent audits. Pre-established incident plans with named accountable officers. Protected vulnerability reporting.

name: NIST CSF Exemplar Adopters
harmDescription: Named owners per function. Independent third-party assessments. Named SOC reviewers with authority. Pre-established IR playbooks. Protected internal reporting.

name: IDF Unit 8200 Cyber Command
harmDescription: Named command authority per cyber domain. Independent capability validation. Named commanders. Pre-established rules of engagement. Protected internal reporting.

name: Netherlands NCSC Critical Infra
harmDescription: Named sectoral coordinators per domain. Mandatory independent assessments. Structured monitoring with named authority. Pre-established incident coordination. Protected VDP.

name: Canada Banks OSFI Framework
harmDescription: OSFI required named CISO with board authority. Independent technology risk reviews. Named reviewers with escalation paths. Pre-established incident accountability.

name: Cloudflare DDoS Resilience
harmDescription: Named owners per infrastructure component. Independent red team. 24/7 monitoring with named on-call authority. Pre-established customer comms protocols. Protected security reporting.

name: Taiwan Government Cyber Resilience
harmDescription: Faces 5M attack attempts daily. Named authority per agency. Independent audits. Named decision-makers. Pre-established incident escalation. Protected civil servant reporting.

name: US DoD Defense Industrial Base
harmDescription: Named contractor security officers with authority. Mandatory CMMC assessments. DoD-integrated monitoring. Pre-established accountability for contractor breaches. Protected employee reporting.

name: UK Lloyds Cyber Insurance Governance
harmDescription: Named underwriting authority per risk category. Independent actuarial validation. Named reviewers. Pre-established claims accountability. Protected underwriter reporting.

name: GitHub Supply Chain Security
harmDescription: Named security owners per service. Mandatory independent code review before deployment. Named on-call authority. Pre-established customer notification. Protected vulnerability reporting.

name: Norway NSM Cyber Resilience
harmDescription: Named sectoral security managers per ministry. Mandatory NSM assessments. Named authority at NSM. Pre-established incident coordination. Protected government employee reporting.

name: US CISA Critical Infrastructure
harmDescription: Named sector risk management agencies. Independent security assessments. Named CISA coordinators. Pre-established incident response authorities. Protected reporting channels.

name: Australian ASD Essential Eight
harmDescription: Named agency heads accountable for compliance. Independent ASD maturity assessments. Named reviewers. Pre-established agency breach accountability. Protected gap reporting.

name: Denmark CFCS Government IT
harmDescription: Named authority per government IT system. Mandatory independent assessments. CFCS monitoring with named decision authority. Pre-established incident protocols. Protected reporting.

name: New Zealand GCSB Cyber Framework
harmDescription: Named agency security leads. Mandatory GCSB assessments for classified systems. Named CERT NZ reviewers. Pre-established incident accountability. Protected government employee reporting.

name: Swiss National Bank Cyber
harmDescription: Named technology risk officer with board authority. Independent third-party assessments. Named reviewers. Pre-established incident accountability. Protected internal reporting.

name: Mastercard Cyber Intelligence Center
harmDescription: Named security owners per payment component. Independent red team. Named reviewers with C-suite escalation. Pre-established incident accountability. Protected internal reporting.

name: US Federal Reserve Tech Oversight
harmDescription: Named technology risk examiners per institution. Mandatory independent reviews. Named Fed reviewers. Pre-established accountability for institution breaches. Protected bank employee reporting.

name: Japan NISC Critical Infrastructure
harmDescription: Named sectoral coordinators per domain. Mandatory independent assessments. Named NISC reviewers. Pre-established incident coordination. Protected vulnerability reporting.

name: South Korea ISMS Financial
harmDescription: Named CISO with board authority mandated. Mandatory ISMS certification. Named reviewers. Pre-established incident accountability to FSC. Protected compliance reporting.

name: Mozilla Firefox Security
harmDescription: Named security module owners in open source structure. Independent research via bug bounty. Named security team reviewers. Pre-established responsible disclosure. Protected contributor reporting.

name: US FDIC Bank Examination
harmDescription: Named technology risk examiners. Independent IT examination. Named FDIC reviewers. Pre-established accountability for bank technology failures. Protected employee reporting.

name: Finland TRAFICOM Cyber Governance
harmDescription: Named authority per regulated sector. Mandatory independent assessments. Named TRAFICOM reviewers. Pre-established incident accountability. Protected entity reporting.

name: Stripe Payment Security
harmDescription: Named security owners per payment component. Independent PCI plus additional assessments. Named reviewers with escalation. Pre-established merchant notification accountability. Protected internal reporting.

name: South African Reserve Bank Oversight
harmDescription: Named technology risk supervisors per institution. Mandatory independent reviews. Named PA reviewers. Pre-established accountability for failures. Protected employee reporting.

name: NATO CCDCOE
harmDescription: Named authority per member nation domain. Independent assessment via Locked Shields exercises. Named national POCs. Pre-established NATO incident coordination. Protected alliance reporting.

name: Google Project Zero
harmDescription: Named researchers per vulnerability domain. Independent validation before disclosure. Structured timeline monitoring. Pre-established 90-day vendor accountability. Protected external researcher reporting.

name: UK GCHQ/NCSC Threat Intel Sharing
harmDescription: Named authority per threat domain. Independent validation before dissemination. Named NCSC reviewers. Pre-established sharing accountability. Protected private sector reporting.

name: IBM X-Force Incident Response
harmDescription: Named incident commanders with documented authority. Independent forensic validation. Named reviewers during incidents. Pre-established client accountability. Protected responder reporting.

name: Dutch Tax Authority IT Governance
harmDescription: Named system owners per component. Mandatory independent IT audits. Named reviewers with board escalation. Pre-established accountability for processing errors. Protected employee reporting.

name: Singapore MAS Technology Risk
harmDescription: Named technology risk officers at board level mandated. Mandatory independent assessments. Named MAS reviewers. Pre-established accountability for outages. Protected employee reporting.

name: US TSA Pipeline Cyber Directives
harmDescription: Named cybersecurity coordinators required per operator. Independent assessments mandated. Named TSA reviewers. Pre-established 12-hour incident reporting. Protected employee reporting.

name: Apple Platform Security
harmDescription: Named security owners per platform component. Independent security research program. Named reviewers with CISO escalation. Pre-established update accountability. Protected internal security reporting.

name: EU NIS2 Critical Sector Operators
harmDescription: Named management accountability required. Mandatory independent security audits. Named national authority reviewers. Pre-established 24-hour incident reporting. Protected employee reporting.

name: US CISA Vulnerability Disclosure Platform
harmDescription: Named agency coordinators per agency. Independent validation of reports. Named CISA reviewers. Pre-established 90-day remediation accountability. Protected external researcher reporting.
